top_concepts.name: capacity building
top_concepts.description: systematic development of skills and knowledge among target beneficiaries

top_concepts.name: climate-smart agriculture
top_concepts.description: farming practices that address climate change while improving productivity

top_concepts.name: food security
top_concepts.description: reliable access to sufficient nutritious food

top_concepts.name: climate adaptation
top_concepts.description: adjustments in systems to reduce vulnerability to climate change impacts

top_concepts.name: climate information services
top_concepts.description: delivery of weather and climate data to support decision-making

top_concepts.name: climate resilience
top_concepts.description: ability to withstand and adapt to climate change impacts

top_concepts.name: variety registration
top_concepts.description: official approval of new varieties for commercial release

top_concepts.name: biofortification
top_concepts.description: enhancing nutritional content of crops through breeding

top_concepts.name: value chain development
top_concepts.description: systematic improvement of market linkages and business relationships

top_concepts.name: early warning systems
top_concepts.description: monitoring and forecasting systems to predict and prepare for emergencies

top_concepts.name: drought tolerance
top_concepts.description: plant ability to maintain productivity under water stress

top_concepts.name: multi-stakeholder platforms
top_concepts.description: collaborative spaces bringing together diverse actors for innovation and change

top_concepts.name: participatory research
top_concepts.description: research approach involving stakeholders as active participants in knowledge generation

top_concepts.name: marker-assisted selection
top_concepts.description: breeding technique using molecular markers to select for desired traits

top_concepts.name: one health approach
top_concepts.description: collaborative framework integrating human, animal, and environmental health

top_concepts.name: agroecological transition
top_concepts.description: shift from conventional to sustainable farming practices that work with natural ecosystems

top_concepts.name: multifunctional landscapes
top_concepts.description: land management strategy that integrates multiple functions and services across landscapes

top_concepts.name: gender transformative approaches
top_concepts.description: interventions that address root causes of gender inequality and transform power relations

top_concepts.name: direct-seeded rice
top_concepts.description: rice cultivation technique where seeds are sown directly in fields without transplanting

top_concepts.name: germplasm utilization
top_concepts.description: use of genetic resources from gene banks or research collections for crop improvement
